skill.description: Use MediChat-RD to search rare diseases, fetch structured disease details, and screen symptom sets for likely rare-disease candidates.

prompts.activationShort: Use MediChat-RD when you need rare-disease search, disease detail lookup, or symptom screening.
prompts.activationLong: Use this skill when the user needs rare-disease knowledge retrieval, structured disease detail lookup, or a first-pass symptom screening against the MediChat-RD curated rare-disease dataset.
prompts.systemSummary: MediChat-RD is a rare-disease assistant that can search a curated disease knowledge base, return structured disease details, and screen symptom sets for likely rare-disease matches.

actions.name: searchDiseases
actions.description: Search rare diseases by keyword, symptom, gene, or category.

actions.name: getDiseaseDetail
actions.description: Get structured detail for a specific rare disease.

actions.name: screenSymptoms
actions.description: Screen a symptom set against the MediChat-RD rare-disease database.
